# Daisy (The Daisy) -- Full Reference

> Daisy is an AI-powered beauty and wellness platform that helps salons, spas, clinics, and beauty businesses grow through an AI receptionist, 360-degree customer acquisition (marketplace + cashback + marketing automation), and full white-label brand control. Available in English and Arabic with native GCC support across UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman, and Qatar.

## Company Overview

- **Website**: https://www.jointhedaisy.com
- **Type**: B2B SaaS platform for beauty and wellness businesses
- **Founded**: Pre-launch, pilot partners committed
- **Markets**: GCC (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman, Qatar) and global
- **Languages**: Full bilingual English and Arabic with native RTL support
- **Platforms**: iOS App, Android App, Progressive Web App, Mobile Web

## What Makes Daisy Different

1. **AI Receptionist**: 24/7 AI-powered voice and chat receptionist that handles customer inquiries, books appointments, and processes payments automatically -- no missed calls or after-hours lost revenue.

2. **360-Degree Customer Acquisition**: Unlike operations-only tools, Daisy combines a discovery marketplace, cashback loyalty system, and automated marketing into one platform that actively brings new customers to your business.

3. **Full White-Label Brand Control**: Every customer touchpoint (booking page, app, receipts, communications) can be fully branded to your business -- your brand, not Daisy's.

4. **Network Effects**: The AI improves with more data across the platform, delivering smarter scheduling, better recommendations, and more accurate business insights over time.

5. **All-in-One Platform**: Replaces 5+ separate tools (booking, POS, CRM, marketing, analytics) with one integrated system across 8 feature categories.

6. **Bilingual Arabic/English**: Native Arabic support with equal priority -- not a translation layer. Designed for GCC markets with local payment methods, compliance, and support.

## Pricing Plans (Flat Pricing, No Per-Staff Fees)

### Basic Plan -- $50/month
- Up to 5 users
- 1 workspace/location
- Unlimited bookings
- Point of Sale (POS)
- Client management
- Mobile and desktop app
- 14-day free trial

### Growth Plan -- $150/month
- Up to 10 users
- 2 workspaces/locations
- Everything in Basic, plus:
- Online payment processing
- Automated appointment reminders
- Marketplace visibility and discovery
- Priority customer support

### Business Plan -- $250/month
- Up to 15 users
- 4 workspaces/locations
- Everything in Growth, plus:
- Advanced analytics and reporting
- Free data migration from other platforms
- Assisted onboarding
- All premium features included

### Pricing Highlights
- No transaction fees on any plan
- No marketplace commission
- No per-staff pricing that scales unpredictably
- Transparent flat monthly rate
- 14-day free trial on all plans
- Free data migration (Business plan)

## Feature Categories (Detailed)

### 1. Online Booking & Scheduling
AI-powered appointment management with real-time availability, automated reminders, waitlist management, and 24/7 online booking. Smart scheduling optimizes staff utilization and reduces gaps.

### 2. POS & Payments
Integrated point of sale with no transaction fees, multiple payment methods, receipt management, and tip handling. Supports local payment methods in GCC markets.

### 3. Client Management
Full CRM with customer profiles, appointment history, preferences, notes, and communication history. Track customer lifetime value and identify VIP clients.

### 4. Staff Management
Employee scheduling, shift management, performance tracking, commission calculations, and access controls. Calendar sync with Google Calendar for two-way updates.

### 5. Marketing & CRM
Automated marketing campaigns, cashback rewards system, customer acquisition tools, email/SMS marketing, and promotional campaign management. Includes marketplace listing for discovery.

### 6. Inventory Management
Product and supply tracking, low-stock alerts, supplier management, and inventory reporting. Track product usage per service for accurate cost analysis.

### 7. Reporting & Analytics
AI-driven business insights including revenue analytics, staff performance, customer retention metrics, booking trends, and financial reporting. Predictive analytics for demand forecasting.

### 8. AI Capabilities
- **AI Voice Receptionist**: Handles phone calls 24/7, books appointments, answers questions
- **AI Chatbot**: Manages online inquiries and booking via chat
- **Smart Scheduling**: AI optimizes appointment slots to maximize revenue
- **Marketing Automation**: AI-driven campaign targeting and optimization
- **Predictive Analytics**: Demand forecasting and business insights

## Solution Pages (Detailed)

### Salon Management Software
AI-powered all-in-one salon management platform with booking, POS, CRM, staff scheduling, inventory, and marketing. Designed for hair salons, beauty salons, and multi-location salon businesses.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/solutions/salon-management-software

### Spa Booking System
Comprehensive spa scheduling and management software with treatment room management, package booking, membership management, and wellness-focused features.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/solutions/spa-booking-system

### Beauty Salon Software
Complete beauty business software with cashback customer loyalty, AI receptionist, and tools designed specifically for beauty industry workflows.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/solutions/beauty-salon-software

### Salon Appointment Scheduling
Smart scheduling software that uses AI to optimize appointment slots, reduce no-shows with automated reminders, and manage staff calendars efficiently.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/solutions/salon-appointment-scheduling

### Barbershop Software
Barbershop-specific management tools with walk-in queue management, barber scheduling, and male grooming service optimization.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/solutions/barbershop-software

### Nail Salon Software
Nail salon booking and management with service duration optimization, technician scheduling, and product inventory tracking for nail supplies.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/solutions/nail-salon-software

### Med Spa Software
Medical spa software with compliance features, consent form management, treatment tracking, and HIPAA-aware data handling for aesthetic medicine practices.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/solutions/med-spa-software

### Salon POS System
Integrated point of sale for salons with retail product sales, service bundling, tip management, and financial reporting without transaction fees.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/solutions/salon-pos-system

### Salon CRM Software
AI-powered customer relationship management for salons with automated follow-ups, customer segmentation, loyalty tracking, and personalized marketing.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/solutions/salon-crm-software

### Salon Marketing Software
Marketing automation platform for salons with cashback campaigns, email/SMS marketing, social media integration, and customer acquisition tools.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/solutions/salon-marketing-software

### Salon Booking App
Mobile-first salon booking app for iOS and Android with real-time availability, cashback rewards, and customer self-service features.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/solutions/salon-booking-app

### Beauty Business Management
All-in-one platform for managing beauty businesses of any size, from single-chair operators to multi-location enterprises.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/solutions/beauty-business-management

Cashback loyalty, referral programmes, marketplace visibility, and marketing automation.

Integrated POS, invoicing, tip management, and financial reporting with no transaction fees.

Multi-location expansion, marketplace discovery, customer acquisition, and white-label branding.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/features/business/business-growth

Staff scheduling, performance tracking, commission management, and role-based access.

### Analytics & Reports
AI-driven business insights, revenue analytics, staff performance, and predictive forecasting.

AI-powered tools for beauty professionals: smart scheduling, client insights, and career automation.

Personal appointment scheduling, calendar management, and client self-booking.

Client messaging, automated follow-ups, and review collection for professionals.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/features/professional/communication-tools

Build your personal brand, attract clients, and grow your reputation.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/features/professional/marketing-promotions

### Payment & Invoicing
Accept payments, manage invoices, and track tips and commissions.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/features/professional/payment-processing

### Career Growth
Build your client base, gain marketplace visibility, and grow your career.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/features/professional/business-growth

Manage your availability, work-life balance, and multi-location schedules.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/features/professional/team-management

### Earnings & Analytics
Track earnings, performance metrics, and client insights.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/features/professional/analytics-reports

## Competitor Comparisons (Summary)

### Daisy vs Fresha
Fresha is a free marketplace-based platform (recently introducing paid features). Daisy offers AI receptionist, cashback loyalty, and white-label branding that Fresha lacks. Fresha charges marketplace commission; Daisy uses flat pricing with no commissions.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/compare/daisy-vs-fresha

### Daisy vs Booksy
Booksy is a mobile-first marketplace popular with barbers. Daisy provides deeper AI capabilities, Arabic language support, and business growth tools beyond basic booking.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/compare/daisy-vs-booksy

### Daisy vs Vagaro
Vagaro offers feature-rich salon software at $49-199/mo with per-staff pricing. Daisy's flat pricing model and AI capabilities provide better value for growing businesses.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/compare/daisy-vs-vagaro

### Daisy vs GlossGenius
GlossGenius focuses on design-forward booking for solo professionals. Daisy serves businesses of all sizes with multi-location support and advanced AI tools.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/compare/daisy-vs-glossgenius

### Daisy vs Mindbody
Mindbody targets fitness and wellness with enterprise pricing ($75-150+/mo). Daisy offers comparable features at lower price points with superior AI and GCC market support.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/compare/daisy-vs-mindbody

### Daisy vs Boulevard
Boulevard is a premium US-focused platform ($188M funded). Daisy matches Boulevard's sophistication while serving GCC markets and offering flat pricing without per-staff fees.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/compare/daisy-vs-boulevard

### Daisy vs Glamera
Glamera is an Arabic-native Saudi marketplace. Daisy provides a more comprehensive AI suite, true bilingual support (not Arabic-only), and business growth tools beyond marketplace listing.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/compare/daisy-vs-glamera

### Daisy vs DINGG
DINGG is India-based with AI features expanding to UAE. Daisy offers native GCC presence with local payment integrations, Arabic support, and deeper AI receptionist capabilities.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/compare/daisy-vs-dingg

### Daisy vs RepeatMD
RepeatMD focuses on med spa growth with cashback ($700/mo). Daisy provides similar cashback mechanics at a fraction of the price while serving all beauty verticals.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/compare/daisy-vs-repeatmd

### Daisy vs Planity
Planity is a French marketplace (10M+ monthly bookings). Daisy offers global reach with GCC focus, AI receptionist, and growth tools beyond marketplace-only discovery.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/compare/daisy-vs-planity

### Daisy vs Mangomint
Mangomint is a premium US salon software with clean UX. Daisy matches the modern interface while adding AI receptionist, cashback, and Arabic/GCC market support.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/compare/daisy-vs-mangomint

### Daisy vs Square Appointments
Square Appointments is part of Square's payment ecosystem. Daisy provides deeper beauty-specific features, AI capabilities, and no reliance on Square hardware.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/compare/daisy-vs-square-appointments

### Daisy vs Phorest
Phorest focuses on salon client retention. Daisy adds AI receptionist, marketplace discovery, and cashback acquisition tools to complement retention strategies.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/compare/daisy-vs-phorest

### Daisy vs Acuity Scheduling
Acuity (by Squarespace) is a general appointment scheduler. Daisy is purpose-built for beauty with industry-specific features, AI, and integrated payments.
URL: https://www.jointhedaisy.com/en/compare/daisy-vs-acuity-scheduling
